title: Distinguished Visitors at JUIT
content: Visitors at JUIT Distinguished Visitors at JUIT Visitors mirror the growing reputation of any Institute. At JUIT Waknaghat boasts of a great lineage of visitors from Indian and abroad who visited the campus toli/listrengthen and foster learning and research activities. Here are a few personalities who have visited the University: His Excellency, Shri Bandaru Dattatreya ,the Governor of Himachal Pradesh and the Chancellor of JUIT (21-Nov- 2019) Shri Sita Ram Mardi, IPS, Director General of Police, Himachal Pradesh (20-April 2019) Dr. R K Sani, South Dakota, USA (01-Aug-19) Dr. Akhilesh Sharma Scientist 'G', DRDO TRBL(31-Jul-19) Dr. Pratibha Sharma Clinical Psychologist(25-Jul-19) Prof. Debashis Ghosh , HoD, ECE Dept, IIT Roorkee, Roorkee (23-Mar-19) Dr. Manish Sharma , Scientist, Group Head Genomic Division, Peptide and Proteomics, DIPAS, New Delhi (12-Mar-19) Dr. Yashwant Gupta , Prof., Univ.
